arts.ttl: Connor Barron inspired by Napoli's Scottish imports as Rangers star hopes to make Europa League splash
arts.sum: The Ibrox midfielder was called up to the Scotland squad for the first time for the Nations League double header against Poland and Portugal

arts.ttl: McTominay: “Proud to be at Napoli. Conte? Very demanding”
arts.sum: Scottish midfielder Scott McTominay has expressed his pride and excitement about his move to Napoli. In a recent interview with the club’s official channels, McTominay shared his thoughts on his new team, manager Antonio Conte, and his aspirations in Serie A. McTominay revealed that when he learned of Napoli’s interest, he felt a fire ignite within him. “I’m proud to play here,” he stated. “When I heard about Napoli’s interest, I felt the fire inside me. I wanted to come here and push as much as possible because the fans are crazy, I’d say they’re among the best fans I’ve The post McTominay: “Proud to be at Napoli. Conte? Very demanding” appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Osimhen Unlikely to Move in January, Juventus Loom
arts.sum: Galatasaray are confident that Victor Osimhen will stay put past the winter window, while the buzz about his potential transfer to Juventus in 2025 is intensifying. His release clause will remain €130M in the next transfer market session. The post Osimhen Unlikely to Move in January, Juventus Loom appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku stops Victor Osimhen joining Man Utd
arts.sum: Romelu Lukaku ’s brutal form for Chelsea was a key reason why Manchester United opted against moving for Victor Osimhen this summer. Signing Osimhen, who wanted to move to the Premier League and had enjoyed a prolific spell at Napoli and led them to a historic Scudetto in 2023, seemed like a no-brainer for United.

arts.ttl: Manchester United’s reason for not signing Victor Osimhen doesn’t make any sense
arts.sum: Manchester United fans will be absolutely baffled by their club’s concerns over pursuing the transfer of Victor Osimhen while he was at Napoli.
